Letra_cifra:
Obs.: Recomenda-se afinar o violao meio tom abaixo (Eb,
 Ab, Db, Gb, Bb, Eb)
      e seguir a ordem dos acordes abaixo.

 (G)
Intr.: (G G/B C9 Am7 D4 C D D4) 2x

G G/B          C9                    Am7    D4    C  
    Saying "I love you" is not the word I want to 
  D D4 G
hear from you
    G/B              C9              Am7     D4     
    It's not that I want you not to say, but if you 
C    Em
only knew
    Bm  Am    D               G      D/F#     Em
    How easy it would be to show me how you feel
    Bm        Am
    More than words
       D               G7             C
    Is all you have to do to make it real
             Cm                G            Em7

    Am7         D      G
    Cause I'd already know
                 D/F#       Em        Bm      C

:              D              G

    C9                      Am7  D    D4   G   G/B
    La la ri la la ri la ri la, more than words
    C                 Am7  D
    La la ri la la ri la

understand
    G/B     C9              Am7     D4       C

reach out your hands
    Bm        Am  D                   G    D/F#   Em

    Bm        Am
